system.powerDescription:
With a touch, you absorb an object of up to CAT size into your body. If someone is inside the object, it will gently phase through them as it enters your body. Whilst you have an object absorbed you may do the following: 

• Morph your skin into the material of the object. 
• Manifest the object partially or fully from any part of your body and reabsorb it without issue. 
• Use traits of the object such as speed (bicycle), photography (camera) or starting small flames (lighter). 

When this power comes to an end you may gently eject the object from your body or fully absorb it and cause its existence to cease. 

Gain or grant +1D when next you or an ally take advantage of this power. This power may effect the parameters of a roll whilst active.
